name: PAX Prep Tongs
summary: These PAX tongs have unique capabilities - easily transporting, packing, and cleaning flower.
description: These PAX tongs have unique capabilities - easily transporting, packing, and cleaning flower. With a stainless steel construction, they are also highly convenient to clean. The top includes a silicone tamp, ideal for packing your PAX oven or bowl. Discreetly concealed beneath the silicone is a tool for removing materials. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
